name: Brain MRI Pituitary Protocol
description: Dedicated brain MRI protocol for evaluation of the pituitary gland and sella region

findings.technique: Dedicated pituitary protocol MRI including thin-slice sagittal and coronal T1, T2, FLAIR, and post-contrast T1 sequences through the sella region.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Pituitary Gland
sections.content: The pituitary gland measures approximately [X mm in craniocaudal dimension] and demonstrates [normal T1 signal / homogeneous signal / no mass lesion]. The gland is [normally positioned / partially empty sella / asymmetric].

sections.name: Pituitary Microadenoma
sections.content: There is [no hypointense lesion on T1 / no focal lesion / no adenoma identified] within the pituitary gland.

sections.name: Macroadenoma
sections.content: There is [no sellar mass / no macroadenoma / no suprasellar extension]. The optic chiasm is [not elevated / not compressed].

sections.name: Post-Contrast Enhancement
sections.content: Following contrast administration, the pituitary gland demonstrates [homogeneous enhancement / no abnormal enhancement / no delayed enhancement].

sections.name: Suprasellar Region
sections.content: The suprasellar region demonstrates [no mass / no abnormal enhancement / no cyst]. The infundibulum is [midline / normal].

sections.name: Optic Chiasm
sections.content: The optic chiasm is [normal in position / not elevated / not displaced]. No abnormal signal in the chiasm.

sections.name: Cavernous Sinus
sections.content: The bilateral cavernous sinuses are [patent / unremarkable]. The carotid arteries are [normal in course / not encased / no narrowing]. No abnormal cavernous sinus enhancement.

sections.name: Sella Turcica
sections.content: The sella turcica demonstrates [normal morphology / no bony erosion / no abnormal mineralization]. The dorsum sellae is intact.

sections.name: Hypothalamus and Mammillary Bodies
sections.content: The hypothalamus demonstrates [normal signal / no abnormality]. The mammillary bodies are [intact / normal].

impression:
1. Normal pituitary MRI.
2. No sellar or suprasellar mass identified.
3. The pituitary gland is normal in size and morphology.
author: RadReport Templates
